creator: yom@iaelu.net
text:
Just adding some deno output to show differences, and the typescript as an attachment

Before patch
> $ /usr/local/bin/deno run --allow-read main.ts 
> {
>   isFile: true,
>   isDirectory: false,
>   isSymlink: false,
>   size: 58,
>   mtime: 2022-07-07T21:48:44.817Z,
>   atime: 2022-07-07T18:53:34.401Z,
>   birthtime: 2022-07-07T18:53:34.401Z,
>   dev: null,
>   ino: null,
>   mode: null,
>   nlink: null,
>   uid: null,
>   gid: null,
>   rdev: null,
>   blksize: null,
>   blocks: null
> }

After patch
> $ deno run --allow-read main.ts 
> {
>   isFile: true,
>   isDirectory: false,
>   isSymlink: false,
>   size: 58,
>   mtime: 2022-07-07T21:48:44.817Z,
>   atime: 2022-07-07T18:53:34.401Z,
>   birthtime: 2022-07-07T18:53:34.401Z,
>   dev: 1724626467,
>   ino: 2310897,
>   mode: 33188,
>   nlink: 1,
>   uid: 1001,
>   gid: 1001,
>   rdev: 4294967295,
>   blksize: 4096,
>   blocks: 1
> }
